query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A yellow diamond-shaped wildlife crossing sign depicting a mother duck and four ducklings in silhouette stands mounted above a rectangular sign reading "DUCK XING" at the edge of a snow-covered road. The scene is set at night beneath a dark sky, with illuminated streetlights lining the road and a red octagonal stop sign visible in the background across the pavement.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A yellow diamond-shaped wildlife crossing sign depicting a mother duck and four ducklings in silhouette stands mounted above a rectangular sign reading "DUCK XING" at the edge of a snow-covered road at night. The background includes a red stop sign, multiple streetlights, and prominent horizontal streaks of red and white light from passing vehicles, created through intentional long-exposure motion blur that produces dynamic light trails across the frame while the foreground signage remains sharp.
